tabs.memory.label: Memory
settings.memory.backend.label: Memory Backend
settings.memory.backend.description: Off, local summary pipeline, Mnemopi SQLite, or Hindsight remote memory
Local SQLite recall/retain backend with optional embeddings
settings.autolearn.enabled.label: Auto-Learn (experimental)
settings.autolearn.enabled.description: After the agent stops, nudge it to capture lessons to memory and create/enhance isolated managed skills
settings.autolearn.autoContinue.label: Auto-run capture at stop
settings.autolearn.autoContinue.descript: When on, auto-run one capture turn at stop (uses extra tokens). Off = passive reminder on your next turn.
settings.mnemopi.dbPath.label: Mnemopi DB Path
settings.mnemopi.dbPath.description: Optional SQLite DB path. Defaults to the agent memories directory.
settings.mnemopi.bank.label: Mnemopi Bank
settings.mnemopi.bank.description: Optional shared bank base name. Per-project modes derive project-local banks from it.
settings.mnemopi.scoping.label: Mnemopi Scoping
settings.mnemopi.scoping.description: global = one shared bank; per-project = isolated bank per cwd; per-project-tagged = project-local writes plus global recall visibility
One shared Mnemopi bank for every project
settings.mnemopi.scoping.options.per-pro: Project-local Mnemopi bank per cwd basename
Write to a project-local bank but merge project + shared recall results
settings.mnemopi.embeddingVariant.label: Embedding variant
settings.mnemopi.embeddingVariant.descri: Local embedding model family. en = stronger English model; multilingual = cross-language model. Changing this rebuilds existing memory embeddings on next start.
settings.mnemopi.autoRecall.label: Mnemopi Auto Recall
settings.mnemopi.autoRecall.description: Recall local memories into the first turn of each session
settings.mnemopi.autoRetain.label: Mnemopi Auto Retain
settings.mnemopi.autoRetain.description: Retain completed conversation turns into local Mnemopi memory
settings.mnemopi.polyphonicRecall.label: Mnemopi Polyphonic Recall
settings.mnemopi.polyphonicRecall.descri: Enable 4-voice recall (vector, graph, fact, temporal) fused with reciprocal rank fusion
settings.mnemopi.enhancedRecall.label: Mnemopi Enhanced Recall
settings.mnemopi.enhancedRecall.descript: Enable the tiered query result cache for repeated and similar recall queries
settings.mnemopi.proactiveLinking.label: Mnemopi Proactive Linking
settings.mnemopi.proactiveLinking.descri: Ingest new memories into the episodic graph as they are stored, linking them to related entities and memories
settings.mnemopi.noEmbeddings.label: Mnemopi Disable Embeddings
settings.mnemopi.noEmbeddings.descriptio: Force deterministic FTS-only recall instead of vector embeddings
settings.mnemopi.embeddingModel.label: Mnemopi Embedding Model
settings.mnemopi.embeddingModel.descript: Advanced: explicit embedding model id that overrides the variant. Leave empty to use mnemopi.embeddingVariant.
settings.mnemopi.embeddingApiUrl.label: Mnemopi Embedding API URL
settings.mnemopi.embeddingApiUrl.descrip: Optional OpenAI-compatible embedding endpoint passed to Mnemopi
settings.mnemopi.embeddingApiKey.label: Mnemopi Embedding API Key
settings.mnemopi.embeddingApiKey.descrip: Optional embedding API key passed to Mnemopi
settings.mnemopi.llmMode.label: Mnemopi LLM Mode
settings.mnemopi.llmMode.description: Use no LLM, the online tiny model (the TINY role from /models, else pi/smol), or a remote OpenAI-compatible endpoint
settings.mnemopi.llmMode.options.smol.de: Use the online tiny model (the TINY role from /models, else pi/smol)
Use the Mnemopi remote LLM settings below
settings.mnemopi.llmBaseUrl.label: Mnemopi LLM Base URL
settings.mnemopi.llmBaseUrl.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint for Mnemopi remote mode
settings.mnemopi.llmApiKey.label: Mnemopi LLM API Key
settings.mnemopi.llmApiKey.description: Optional LLM API key for Mnemopi remote mode
settings.mnemopi.llmModel.label: Mnemopi LLM Model
settings.mnemopi.llmModel.description: Optional LLM model name for Mnemopi remote mode
settings.hindsight.apiUrl.label: Hindsight API URL
settings.hindsight.bankId.label: Hindsight Bank ID
settings.hindsight.scoping.label: Hindsight Scoping
settings.hindsight.scoping.description: global = one shared bank; per-project = isolated bank per cwd; per-project-tagged = shared bank with project tags so global + project memories merge on recall
settings.hindsight.scoping.options.globa: One shared bank — every project sees the same memories
settings.hindsight.scoping.options.per-p: Isolated bank per cwd basename — projects cannot see each other's memories
Shared bank, retains tagged with project:<cwd>. Recall surfaces project + untagged global memories together
settings.hindsight.autoRecall.label: Hindsight Auto Recall
settings.hindsight.autoRecall.descriptio: Recall memories on the first turn of each session
settings.hindsight.autoRetain.label: Hindsight Auto Retain
settings.hindsight.autoRetain.descriptio: Retain transcript every N turns and at session boundaries
settings.hindsight.retainMode.label: Hindsight Retain Mode
settings.hindsight.retainMode.descriptio: full-session = upsert one document per session, last-turn = chunked
settings.hindsight.retainMode.options.la: Chunked retention sliced by turn boundaries
settings.hindsight.mentalModelsEnabled.d: Read curated reflect summaries (mental models) into developer instructions at boot. Loads existing models on the bank — does not write. Pair with hindsight.mentalModelAutoSeed to also auto-create the built-in seed set.
settings.hindsight.mentalModelAutoSeed.d: At session start, create any built-in mental models (project-conventions, project-decisions, user-preferences) that do not yet exist on the bank.
settings.providers.memoryModel.label: Memory Model
settings.providers.memoryModel.descripti: Mnemopi LLM for fact extraction + consolidation: online (the TINY role from /models, else smol/remote) by default, or a local on-device model
